agent_recommendation: Use the demo fixture as a low-risk bounded-polish lane for spacing and style-rule extraction, not as a manuscript release target.

bounded_packet.target_surface: panel spacing and local TikZ style rules
bounded_packet.recommended_action: Prepare a small comparison note for spacing/style invariants before any source polish slice is opened.
style_lock_checks: preserve fixture identity and panel semantics
compare current panel spacing before proposing TikZ edits
keep any future polish bounded to demo-fixture spacing/style extraction

current_state.review_mode_interpretation: demo fixture is safe for spacing/style dogfood, not manuscript acceptance

allowed_adjustments: propose a later bounded TikZ polish slice
forbidden_adjustments: do not edit figure source files
do not edit tracked golden artifacts

risk.primary: A demo spacing packet can be mistaken for manuscript acceptance unless it preserves the style-direction schema and no-source-mutation boundary.

follow_up.implementation_slice: Extract a bounded panel-spacing/style-lock comparison packet; do not mutate source in this selection record.
